title: skimmia japonica subsp. distincte-venulosa
intro: Skimmia japonica subsp. distincte-venulosa, also known as the Japanese skimmia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. It is native to Asia and is used in traditional medicine, valued for its medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Skimmia japonica subsp. distincte-venulosa include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and improving digestion. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
